briefdescription.para: Macro for mapping relative MRAMC offset to absolute address.

parameterdescription.para: Offset to map.

briefdescription.para: Symbol to set DISABLEECC default configuration.

memberdef.name: NRFX_MRAMC_DEFAULT_CONFIG
memberdef.initializer: { \ .config = { \ .mode_write = NRF_MRAMC_MODE_WRITE_DISABLE, \ .mode_erase = NRF_MRAMC_MODE_ERASE_DISABLE, \ NRFX_MRAMC_CONFIG_DISABLEECC \ }, \ .preload_timeout = { \ .value = NRF_MRAMC_READYNEXTTIMEOUT_DEFAULT, \ .direct_write = true, \ }, \ .powerdown = { \ .enable = false, \ .power_down_cfg = false, \ .timeout_value = NRF_MRAMC_AUTOPOWERDOWN_TIMEOUT_MIN, \ }, \ .lowavgcurr = { \ .read = NRF_MRAMC_LOWAVGCURR_READ_MIN, \ .write = NRF_MRAMC_LOWAVGCURR_WRITE_MIN, \ .erase = NRF_MRAMC_LOWAVGCURR_ERASE_MIN, \ }, \ .irq_priority = NRFX_MRAMC_DEFAULT_CONFIG_IRQ_PRIORITY, \ }

briefdescription.para: MRAMC driver default configuration.

detaileddescription.para:
This configuration sets up MRAMC with the following options:
Write mode disabled
Erase mode disabled
ECC enabled (if present)
Preload timeout value: 0x0
Write to the MRAM backed-to-backed on the next preload timeout in direct mode enabled
Automatic power-down feature disabled
Entering power-down mode when the timeout happens disabled
Access timeout: 0x0
Low average current read, write, and erase preload timeout values: 0x0

briefdescription.para: MRAMC driver event handler type.

parameterdescription.para: MRAMC event.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the address is valid.

parameterdescription.para: Address to be checked.
If true, the UICR area is considered valid.
Address is valid.
Address is invalid.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the address and size fit in MRAM memory.

parameterdescription.para: Address to be checked.
If true, the UICR area is considered valid.
Number of bytes to be checked.
Address and size fit in memory.
Address and size not fitting in memory.

briefdescription.para: Function for erasing the whole MRAM memory.

simplesect.para: All user code and UICR will be erased.

briefdescription.para: Function for writing a 32-bit word to MRAM.

simplesect.para: Depending on the source of the code being executed, the CPU may be halted during the operation. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Address to where data is to be written. Must be word-aligned.
Value to be written.

briefdescription.para: Function for writing consecutive 32-bit words to MRAM.

detaileddescription.para: Function uses direct write mode to write to MRAM directly.

simplesect.para: Depending on the source of the code being executed, the CPU may be halted during the operation. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Address to where data is to be written. Must be word-aligned.
Pointer to data to be copied. Must be word-aligned.
Number of words to be written.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading consecutive bytes from MRAM.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the buffer to store the data.
Address of the first byte to be read. Must be word-aligned.
Number of bytes to be read.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the MRAMC write mode.

parameterdescription.para: One of the enum in nrf_mramc_mode_write_t.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the MRAMC erase mode.

parameterdescription.para: One of the enum in nrf_mramc_mode_erase_t.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the MRAMC NVR page write and erase permission,.

simplesect.para: : Setting enable allows nrf_mramc_readynext_timeout_t diret_write and preload_timeout to minimum, nrf_mramc_config_nvr_t PAGE[n] to be writtable and erasable.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable write and erase permission of CONFIGNVR.PAGE[n], false to disable.
Page number of CONFIGNVR.PAGE[0...n].

briefdescription.para: Function for initializing the MRAMC driver instance.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing configuration.
Event handler provided by the user.
Initialization was successful.
The driver has already been initialized.

briefdescription.para: Function for reconfiguring the MRAMC driver instance.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing configuration.
Reconfiguration was successful.
The driver is uninitialized.

briefdescription.para: Function for uninitializing the MRAMC driver instance.
Function for getting the total MRAM size in bytes.

simplesect.para: The function will return FICR_INFO_MRAM_MRAM_Unspecified value if the total MRAM size cannot be determined based on the FICR data.

briefdescription.para: Function for erasing area in MRAM.

parameterdescription.para: Address to be erased.
Size to erase in number of words.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading a 32-bit word from the MRAM.

detaileddescription.para: Use this function in case accessing the MRAM gives the possibility to run the code in an environment where the MRAM is simulated.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the word to be read.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking current MRAMC operation status.

detaileddescription.para: The status is updated for all MRAMC operations.

parameterdescription.para: Current operation is completed, and MRAMC is ready.
MRAMC is busy.
